House of Flying Daggers (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,050,094Details
International Box Office $81,813,851
Worldwide Box Office $92,863,945
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$397,472 (3.6% of total gross)
Legs:6.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:11.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:15 opening theaters/1,189 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,432,328

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 3rd, 2004 (Limited) by Sony Pictures Classics
International Releases: February 11th, 2005 (Wide), released as House Of Flying Daggers (Australia)
Video Release: April 19th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of stylized martial arts violence, and some sexuality
Running Time: 119 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign Language, Wire Fu
Plot point: Government Corruption, Love Triangle, Martial Arts, Relationships Gone Wrong, Robin Hood Bandits, Romance, Sex Crimes
Social setting: Wuxia
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Ancient China, Tang Dynasty
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production Countries: China, Hong Kong
Languages: Mandarin
